channel.title: ACIM Daily Minute
channel.description: Daily readings from A Course in Miracles. One-minute text passages and the 365 Workbook Lessons.

item.title: Daily Minute — June 11, 2026
item.description: The Son of God retains His Father’s Will.The son of man perceives an alien will, and wishes it were so.And thus does his perception serve his wish by giving it appearances of truth.Yet can perception serve another goal. It is not bound to specialness but by your choice.And it IS given you to make a different choice, and use perception for a different purpose.And what you see will serve that purpos

item.title: Lesson 50: “I am sustained by the Love of God.”
item.description: “I am sustained by the Love of God.” Here is the answer to every problem that confronts you today and tomorrow and throughout time. In this world, you believe you are sustained by everything but God.Your faith is placed in the most trivial and insane symbols; pills, money, “protective” clothing, “influence,” “prestige,” being liked, knowing the “right” people, and an endless list of forms of nothi
